---
title: "proxy.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\proxy.ts"
loc: 197
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 4.64
overall_score: 2.69
---

## Intent
The `proxy.ts` module implements the 'Bifrost Proxy', a Fastify-based backend that bridges the analysis engine with the browser visualization. It serves static assets, handles WebSocket telemetry streams, and provides secure HTTP endpoints for retrieving the Gungnir Matrix and historical gravity data.

## Interaction Protocol
Start the proxy by calling the `startProxy` function. It manages client authentication (via tokens), proxies filesystem requests from the UI, and establishes the real-time link between the Node.js analysis logic and the React visual layer.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 40 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /api/matrix`
- `[GET] /api/gravity`
- `[GET] /api/config`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/ping`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/trace`
- `[GET] /api/matrix/trajectories`
- `[GET] /api/matrix/sessions`
- `[GET] /api/matrix/session-pings`
- `[POST] /api/matrix/dispatch`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fastify)
- [*](file://@fastify/static)
- [*](file://@fastify/cors)
- [WebSocketServer](file://ws)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.ts)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [savePing](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [saveTrace](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../intel/database.ts)

### Exports
- `startProxy`
- `startProxy`
- `server`
- `statsDir`
- `token`
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `distDir`
- `url`
- `queryToken`
- `authHeader`
- `wss`
- `clients`
- `cortexLink`
- `msg`
- `sourcePath`
- `targetPath`
- `broadcast`
- `data`
- `graphPath`
- `graphData`
- `gravityPath`
- `gravityData`
- `ping`
- `absPath`
- `trace`
- `filePath`
- `traces`
- `sessions`
- `sessionId`
- `pings`
- `request`
- `projectRoot`
- `cstarPath`
- `result`
- `url`
